Directorate of Administrative Affairs

The Administrative Affairs Directorate

is responsible for the efficient and effective use of resources in accordance with the mission, vision and quality standards of Doğuş University. These services include maintaining the security of the buildings and facilities, taking the necessary precautions against the risk of fire, providing a variety of maintenance and repair services (lighting, elevators, telephone services, plumbing, windows, etc.) as well as general cleaning services and services concerning heating and air-conditioning systems, car-park maintenance, printing and photocopying and the general upkeep of the environment. Doğuş University Administrative Affairs Office aims to offer highest possible standard, fast and practical solutions and quality of service.
